requiredBehaviors.behavior: AgenC requests a GitHub device code with the public device-flow client id, an AgenC-specific environment override, the read:user scope, and JSON responses.
edgeCases: AGENC_GITHUB_DEVICE_CLIENT_ID overrides the default client id
custom scopes retry with read:user when GitHub rejects the first request as invalid_scope
verification_uri is constrained to GitHub's HTTPS device-login URL before any browser opener receives it
HTTP and malformed response failures are surfaced as GitHubDeviceFlowError

requiredBehaviors.behavior: AgenC polls the GitHub OAuth device-code endpoint until an access token is returned or a terminal OAuth error occurs.
edgeCases: authorization_pending sleeps for the current interval
slow_down increases the polling interval and clamps unsafe interval values
foreground polling sleeps remain referenced while the CLI is waiting for authorization
expired_token and access_denied become typed terminal errors
fetch/network failures are wrapped as GitHubDeviceFlowError

requiredBehaviors.behavior: AgenC exchanges the OAuth token for a Copilot token using the required GitHub Copilot-class headers and validates the token response shape.
edgeCases: Authorization uses the OAuth bearer token
User-Agent, Editor-Version, Editor-Plugin-Version, and Copilot-Integration-Id headers are preserved verbatim

requiredBehaviors.behavior: startGitHubDeviceFlow orchestrates device-code prompting, optional verification URI opening, access-token polling, and Copilot token exchange.
edgeCases: the device-code callback runs before polling
the optional browser opener receives the verification URI
polling uses the interval and expiry from the device-code response

intentionalShapeDifferences: The target file uses kebab-case and AgenC-owned public names required by S-17: startGitHubDeviceFlow, pollForGitHubAccessToken, and exchangeForCopilotToken.
The high-level startGitHubDeviceFlow helper composes the lower-level source behaviors because no CLI wiring item exists yet.
The client-id environment override is AGENC_GITHUB_DEVICE_CLIENT_ID per the S-17 item body; the source checkout used its own product-specific environment name.
outOfScope: Persisting either OAuth or Copilot tokens in AuthBackend is intentionally deferred to a future provider/auth integration item.
Provider selection and model routing for Copilot are outside S-17.
